seoTitle: How to Link Shopify to Zendesk for Support Tickets
metaDescription: Follow this guide to link Shopify to Zendesk, install the official app, grant order permissions, and view live customer order data in every ticket.
intro: Support agents shouldn't have to switch tabs to check a customer's order status. Linking Shopify to Zendesk pulls order, fulfillment, and customer data directly into the ticket sidebar, so your team can resolve issues without leaving the conversation. Here's how to install and connect the two platforms.

steps.heading: Open the Shopify App Store
steps.body: Log into your Shopify admin and navigate to the official App Store to find the Zendesk support integration.

steps.heading: Install the app
steps.body: Search for the Shopify support app by Zendesk and click Install on your active store account.

steps.heading: Grant data permissions
steps.body: Review and approve the requested permissions, which typically include reading order details and fulfillment states.

steps.heading: Connect the accounts in Zendesk
steps.body: In Zendesk Admin Center, open the Channels or Apps and Integrations area to generate the token keys needed to complete the connection.

steps.heading: Verify the sidebar app
steps.body: Open an active support ticket to confirm the Shopify sidebar panel loads with live shipping records and customer order history.

steps.heading: Test with a live ticket
steps.body: Run a verification pass on a real or test ticket to make sure order data loads correctly before relying on it for support.

faq.question: Do I need admin access on both platforms?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need Shopify admin permissions to install the app and Zendesk admin access to generate integration tokens.

faq.question: Can agents cancel orders directly from Zendesk?
faq.answer: Depending on the permissions granted, agents can often view and issue cancellations from the connected sidebar panel.

faq.question: Why isn't customer data showing up in a ticket?
faq.answer: The integration typically matches customers by email address, so check that the ticket requester's email matches their Shopify account.

faq.question: Is this integration free?
faq.answer: The official Shopify support app by Zendesk is available through the Shopify App Store; check current listing pricing before installing.
